# Creator Revenue Calculator
> Free revenue calculators for content creators across YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, Instagram, podcasts, and affiliate marketing.

## Tools

### YouTube Ad Revenue Calculator
- URL: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/youtube-ad-revenue/
- Calculate YouTube earnings based on views, CPM rates, and niche. 2026 data for 15+ content categories.

### Twitch Revenue Calculator
- URL: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/twitch-revenue/
- Estimate Twitch earnings from subscriptions, bits, ads, and sponsorships for affiliate and partner channels.

### TikTok Creator Fund Calculator
- URL: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/tiktok-revenue/
- Calculate TikTok Creator Fund earnings based on views, engagement, and region. Estimate brand deal potential.

### Instagram Monetization Calculator
- URL: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/instagram-revenue/
- Estimate Instagram earnings from Reels bonuses, brand partnerships, affiliate marketing, and sponsored posts.

### Podcast Revenue Calculator
- URL: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/podcast-revenue/
- Calculate podcast earnings from sponsorships, ads, subscriptions, and listener support across platforms.

### Affiliate Marketing Calculator
- URL: https://creatorrevenuecalculator.com/tools/affiliate-calculator/
- Estimate affiliate marketing earnings based on traffic, conversion rates, commission rates, and product prices.

## About
All tools are free to use with no account required. Revenue estimates are based on 2026 industry data.

## Contact
- General: hello@creatorrevenuecalculator.com
